name: Caramel Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Turn on stove burner and allow it to heat up.
2. Stir brown sugar and cream in a heavy-bottomed pan until the sugar is completely dissolved.
3. Cover the pan and cook for about 3 minutes, or until steam has washed down any crystals that may have formed on the sides of the pan.
4. Remove from heat and let cool to 110 degrees Fahrenheit (or as indicated by a candy thermometer).
5. Add 3/4 cup butter and stir until melted.
6. Remove vanilla extract and beat until thick and creamy.
7. If needed, thin with a little cream to reach a spreading consistency.
8. Spread over cake; top with chopped nuts if desired.
